attributes.description: Incorporated in 1984, Bliss GVS Pharma Limited is engaged in manufacturing, marketing, trading and export of pharmaceutical formulations in the form of suppositories, pessaries, capsules, tablets, and syrups.

Incorporated in 1984, Bliss GVS Pharma Limited is engaged in manufacturing, marketing, trading and export of pharmaceutical formulations in the form of suppositories, pessaries, capsules, tablets, and syrups.
